name: Basic White Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the liquids (water, butter, and egg) in the bread machine.
2. Add the sweetener (sugar) to the bread machine.
3. Incorporate the salt into the bread machine.
4. Pour in the dry ingredients (bread flour, nonfat dry milk).
5. Finally, add the yeast to the bread machine.
6. Mix and knead according to the bread machine's settings.
7. Turn off the bread machine once baking is complete.
